title: type_: Some("Opaque".to_string()) should be .into() or .to_owned()
description: lib.rs:222: type_: Some("Opaque".to_string()) — .to_string() on a string literal is a clippy warning (clippy::str_to_string). Idiomatic: Some("Opaque".to_owned()) or Some("Opaque".into()). to_string() on &str triggers the format machinery unnecessarily.
